name: Candle Maker
tagline: Handcrafted Candles for Moments of Comfort and Connection
description: We create handcrafted candles that do more than scent a room they create moments of comfort, relaxation, and connection. Using carefully selected fragrances and quality materials, our candles help customers transform their homes into spaces they love to be in.

services.title: Candle Making
services.description: Custom made candles tailored to your preferences, creating the perfect ambiance for any occasion.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.quote: The services provided by Jenny's Candles completely transformed our operations. Their expertise in Candle Making is exceptional.

testimonials.name: Marcus Vance
testimonials.quote: Unbelievable responsiveness and attention to detail. Highly recommended for any serious business.
